summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School Management System - found critical backend serialization issues and frontend error handling problems that prevent core functionality

critical_bugs.issue: 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization failure
critical_bugs.error: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all create operations - users cannot add students, employees, fees, announcements, etc.

critical_bugs.issue: 422 Unprocessable Entity errors during user registration

ui_bugs.issue: React Runtime Error when displaying validation errors
ui_bugs.error: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, ctx})

integration_issues.issue: Frontend cannot properly handle 422 error responses from backend
Dashboard may not load properly due to backend API failures affecting data fetching

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with proper branding and design
Orange accent colors implemented as requested
All form elements have proper data-testid attributes
Read operations work for most endpoints
Beautiful modern UI design with school campus background

success_percentage.backend: 67% (18/27 tests passed, but all write operations failing)
success_percentage.frontend: 70% (UI design excellent, but core functionality broken due to backend issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization in FastAPI backend - all POST operations fail with TypeError. Also fix frontend error handling to properly display validation errors instead of rendering raw error objects. The UI design is excellent but the core functionality is completely broken.
